title: MemGPT: Towards LLMs as Operating Systems
snippet: Packer et al., 2023. OS-inspired virtual memory management for LLMs. Two-tier architecture: main context (RAM) and external context (disk). Self-editing memory through function calls. Core memory, recall memory, archival memory. Foundation for Letta.

metadata.llm_reason: Foundational memory architecture paper, OS-inspired virtual context management
metadata.author: Charles Packer et al.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
snippet: Lewis et al., Meta AI, 2020. RAG combines parametric memory (LLM weights) with non-parametric memory (retrieved documents). Foundational dual-memory architecture. NeurIPS 2020.

metadata.llm_reason: Foundational dual-memory architecture: parametric + non-parametric
metadata.author: Patrick Lewis et al.

title: Generative Agents: Interactive Simulacra of Human Behavior
snippet: Park et al., Stanford, 2023. Memory stream architecture: observation, reflection, planning. Retrieval by recency, importance, relevance. Foundational structured agent memory.

metadata.llm_reason: Pioneered memory stream with recency-importance-relevance retrieval
metadata.author: Joon Sung Park et al.

title: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
snippet: Shinn et al., 2023. Episodic memory buffer stores verbal reflections on task feedback for subsequent trials. NeurIPS 2023.

metadata.llm_reason: Pioneered episodic memory buffer pattern for agent self-improvement
metadata.author: Noah Shinn et al.

title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
snippet: Wang et al., NVIDIA, 2023. Skill library as procedural memory. Agent stores verified code as reusable skills. First open-ended learning agent with persistent procedural memory.

metadata.llm_reason: Landmark agent with procedural memory via skill library
metadata.author: Guanzhi Wang, Jim Fan et al.

title: DSPy: Programming—not prompting—Language Models
snippet: Khattab et al., Stanford. Persistent prompt memory through teleprompter optimization. Self-improving prompt pipeline memory. ICLR 2024.

metadata.llm_reason: Framework with persistent optimized prompt memory
metadata.author: Omar Khattab et al.

title: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models
snippet: Yao et al., 2022. Working memory pattern: reasoning trace as in-context memory for action selection. ICLR 2023.

metadata.llm_reason: Foundational working memory pattern via reasoning traces
metadata.author: Shunyu Yao et al.

title: Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback
snippet: Bai et al., Anthropic. Persistent principle memory drives iterative self-revision. Constitutional rules as long-term memory. Foundation for RLAIF.

metadata.llm_reason: Persistent principle memory driving self-revision loop
metadata.author: Yuntao Bai et al.

title: LangChain Memory Backends
snippet: ConversationBufferMemory, ConversationSummaryMemory, ConversationKnowledgeGraphMemory, VectorStoreRetrieverMemory. Multiple memory pattern implementations.

metadata.llm_reason: Major framework implementing diverse memory architecture patterns
metadata.author: LangChain AI

title: An Empirical Study of Catastrophic Forgetting in LLMs During Continual Fine-tuning
snippet: Luo et al., 2023. LLMs suffer catastrophic forgetting during sequential fine-tuning. Forgetting worsens with model size (1B-7B). Key risk for parametric memory.

metadata.llm_reason: Documents catastrophic forgetting risk in LLM parametric memory
metadata.author: Yun Luo et al.

title: Letta (formerly MemGPT) - Agent Framework with Persistent Memory
snippet: UC Berkeley spin-off, $10M seed. Production hierarchical memory: core/recall/archival. Open-source + commercial.

metadata.llm_reason: Commercial implementation of MemGPT memory architecture
metadata.author: Letta Inc

title: Language Agent Tree Search (LATS)
snippet: Zhou et al., 2023. MCTS with experience memory from failed attempts. LLM-based value functions guide future search.

metadata.llm_reason: Experience memory pattern from failed attempts
metadata.author: Andy Zhou et al.

title: Tree of Thoughts: Deliberate Problem Solving with Large Language Models
snippet: Yao et al., 2023. Search tree as explicit memory of explored reasoning paths. Self-evaluation enables backtracking. NeurIPS 2023.

metadata.llm_reason: Explicit external memory via search tree structure
metadata.author: Shunyu Yao et al.

title: MAGMA: A Multi-Graph based Agentic Memory Architecture for AI Agents
snippet: UT Dallas + U Florida, Jan 2026. Four orthogonal graphs: semantic, temporal, causal, entity. Policy-guided traversal. 45.5% higher reasoning accuracy, 95% token reduction, 40% faster latency vs SOTA.

metadata.llm_reason: State-of-the-art multi-graph memory architecture, Jan 2026
metadata.author: Fred Jiang et al.

title: A-MEM: Agentic Memory for LLM Agents
snippet: Xu et al., NeurIPS 2025. Zettelkasten-inspired agentic memory with dynamic indexing and linking. Memory evolution: new memories trigger updates to historical memories. Doubles multi-hop reasoning performance.

metadata.llm_reason: NeurIPS 2025, Zettelkasten-inspired self-organizing memory
metadata.author: Wujiang Xu et al.

title: Zep: A Temporal Knowledge Graph Architecture for Agent Memory
snippet: Rasmussen et al., Jan 2025. Temporal KG with Graphiti engine. Bi-temporal tracking: event time + ingestion time. Dynamic fact invalidation. 18.5% accuracy improvement, 90% latency reduction.

metadata.llm_reason: Temporal knowledge graph approach outperforming MemGPT, Jan 2025
metadata.author: Preston Rasmussen et al.

title: MemOS: An Operating System for Memory-Augmented Generation in LLMs
snippet: Li et al., May 2025. Memory operating system elevating memory to first-class resource. MemCube abstraction for tracking, fusion, migration of heterogeneous memory. Three types: parametric, activation, plaintext.

metadata.llm_reason: Memory OS framework, May 2025, novel MemCube abstraction
metadata.author: Zhiyu Li et al.

title: EverMemOS: A Self-Organizing Memory Operating System for Structured Long-Horizon Reasoning
snippet: Jan 2026. Engram-inspired lifecycle: episodic trace formation, semantic consolidation, reconstructive recollection. MemCells, MemScenes. 92.3% reasoning accuracy on LoCoMo.

metadata.llm_reason: SOTA memory OS with brain-inspired lifecycle, Jan 2026
metadata.author: EverMind AI

title: MemEngine: A Unified and Modular Library for Developing Advanced Memory of LLM-based Agents
snippet: Renmin University + Huawei, May 2025. Unified library for memory development. TheWebConf'25 oral. Three-layer architecture: foundation, core operations, advanced models. Pluggable memory modules.

metadata.llm_reason: Unified modular memory library, TheWebConf 2025 oral
metadata.author: Renmin University + Huawei

title: Mem0: Memory Layer for AI Applications
snippet: YC-backed. $24M raised (seed + Series A). 186M+ API calls per quarter in Q3 2025. Cross-model memory persistence. Compatible with OpenAI, Anthropic, open-source.

metadata.llm_reason: Leading commercial memory-as-a-service with massive adoption
metadata.author: Mem0 Inc

title: Zep: Context Engineering and Agent Memory Platform
snippet: Temporal knowledge graph platform. Graphiti open-source engine. 94.8% DMR accuracy vs 93.4% MemGPT. 90% latency reduction. Free tier available.

metadata.llm_reason: Commercial temporal KG memory platform outperforming MemGPT
metadata.author: Zep Inc

title: EverMind: Infinite Memory and Long-Term Consistency for AI Agents
snippet: Startup building infinite memory for AI agents. EverMemOS research paper. Long-term consistency across sessions.

metadata.llm_reason: Startup commercializing EverMemOS memory research
metadata.author: EverMind AI

title: Agent Memory Paper List: Memory in the Age of AI Agents Survey
snippet: Comprehensive curated list of 100+ memory architecture papers. Organized by memory type: working, episodic, semantic, procedural. Actively maintained through 2026.

metadata.llm_reason: Curated survey of agent memory architectures, actively maintained
metadata.author: Shichun Liu et al.

title: A Survey on the Memory Mechanism of Large Language Model-based Agents
snippet: ACM TOIS 2025. Comprehensive survey on memory mechanisms. Taxonomy: working memory (in-context), short-term (buffer), long-term (retrieval). Memory operations: read, write, reflect.

metadata.llm_reason: First comprehensive ACM survey on LLM agent memory
metadata.author: ACM TOIS

title: From Storage to Experience: A Survey on the Evolution of LLM Agent Memory
snippet: 2026 survey. Three stages: Storage (trajectory preservation), Reflection (refinement), Experience (abstraction). Evolutionary framework for memory maturity.

metadata.llm_reason: 2026 evolutionary framework for memory system maturity
metadata.author: Preprints.org

title: Memory for Autonomous LLM Agents: Mechanisms, Evaluation, and Emerging Frontiers
snippet: March 2026. Write-manage-read loop formalization. Three-dimensional taxonomy: temporal scope, representational substrate, control policy. Five mechanism families.

metadata.llm_reason: Latest March 2026 survey with formal memory taxonomy
metadata.author: arXiv

title: Multi-Agent Memory from a Computer Architecture Perspective
snippet: March 2026. Frames multi-agent memory as computer architecture problem. Three-layer hierarchy: I/O, cache, memory. Key challenge: multi-agent memory consistency.

metadata.llm_reason: Novel computer architecture framing of multi-agent memory, March 2026
metadata.author: arXiv

title: Continuum Memory Architectures for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
snippet: Jan 2026. Continuum approach vs discrete memory tiers. Addresses memory for sustained long-horizon agent operation.

metadata.llm_reason: Novel continuum memory architecture, Jan 2026
metadata.author: arXiv

title: LoCoMo: Evaluating Very Long-Term Conversational Memory
snippet: Snap Research. Multi-session benchmark: 25 events over 6-12 months, 32 sessions, ~600 turns. Tests factual recall, multi-hop, temporal reasoning. Standard benchmark.

metadata.llm_reason: Standard benchmark for long-term memory evaluation
metadata.author: Snap Research

title: MemoryBench: A Benchmark for Memory and Continual Learning in LLM Systems
snippet: Oct 2025. Tests information extraction, multi-hop reasoning, knowledge updating, preference following, temporal reasoning.

metadata.llm_reason: Dedicated memory benchmark covering 5 evaluation dimensions
metadata.author: arXiv

title: LifeBench: A Benchmark for Long-Horizon Multi-Source Memory
snippet: March 2026. Multi-source long-horizon memory benchmark. Tests integration and reasoning across diverse interaction sources.

metadata.llm_reason: Latest 2026 multi-source memory benchmark
metadata.author: arXiv

title: Human-Like Remembering and Forgetting in LLM Agents: ACT-R-Inspired Memory
snippet: HAI 2025. ACT-R cognitive architecture adapted for LLM agents. Activation-based retrieval models human-like remembering and forgetting.

metadata.llm_reason: Cognitive science bridge: ACT-R memory architecture for agents
metadata.author: HAI 2025

title: Continual Learning of Large Language Models: A Comprehensive Survey
snippet: ACM Computing Surveys, 2025. Catastrophic forgetting mitigation, continual fine-tuning, memory consolidation strategies.

metadata.llm_reason: Comprehensive survey on continual learning and memory risks
metadata.author: ACM Computing Surveys

title: Mechanistic Analysis of Catastrophic Forgetting in LLMs
snippet: Jan 2026. Three mechanisms: gradient interference in attention, representational drift, loss landscape flattening. 15-23% of attention heads severely disrupted.

metadata.llm_reason: Mechanistic understanding of memory degradation, Jan 2026
metadata.author: arXiv

title: ICLR 2026 Workshop: MemAgents - Memory for LLM-Based Agentic Systems
snippet: ICLR 2026 workshop. Dedicated venue for memory architecture research. Signals field maturity as distinct research area.

metadata.llm_reason: ICLR 2026 workshop signals memory as distinct research field
metadata.author: ICLR 2026

title: Design Patterns for Long-Term Memory in LLM-Powered Architectures
snippet: Practical engineering guide: vector store pattern, knowledge graph pattern, hybrid memory, memory consolidation, conversation summarization for production systems.

metadata.llm_reason: Practical production design patterns for LLM memory
metadata.author: Serokell

title: Anatomy of Agentic Memory: Taxonomy and Empirical Analysis
snippet: Feb 2026. Empirical taxonomy of agentic memory. Identifies gaps between theoretical architectures and practical implementations.

metadata.llm_reason: Empirical analysis exposing theory-practice gaps in memory, Feb 2026
metadata.author: arXiv

title: Enhancing Memory Retrieval in Generative Agents through LLM-Trained Cross Attention
snippet: Frontiers in Psychology, 2025. Neural cross-attention for improved memory retrieval in generative agents. Advances Park et al.'s memory stream.

metadata.llm_reason: Neural improvement to memory stream retrieval
metadata.author: Frontiers Psychology

title: Graphiti: Build Real-Time Knowledge Graphs for AI Agents
snippet: Zep's open-source temporal knowledge graph engine. Real-time KG construction from conversations. Bi-temporal entity and relationship tracking.

metadata.llm_reason: Open-source temporal KG engine for agent memory
metadata.author: Zep / Graphiti
